Name: fanatics_tower
Description: A tower to test your skills

ItemTemplates.Name: {GRunic{x {dIron{x Helm
ItemTemplates.Description: A heavy iron greathelm etched with glowing protective runes. The metal feels unnaturally cold to the touch.

ItemTemplates.Name: {RZealot {dIron{x Mask
ItemTemplates.Description: A terrifying facial plate molded into the likeness of a screaming cultist. It completely hides the wearer's expressions.

ItemTemplates.Name: Abyssal {BGlass{x Amulet
ItemTemplates.Description: A sharp shard of void-born glass suspended by a silver chain. It seems to absorb the surrounding ambient light.

ItemTemplates.Name: {dAshen{x Leather Tunic
ItemTemplates.Description: Reinforced leather armour treated with the ashes of forbidden rituals, offering incredible flexibility and stealth.

ItemTemplates.Name: {GRunic{x Leather Gloves
ItemTemplates.Description: Supple calfskin gloves lined with protective sigils along the knuckles to enhance spell delivery or weapon grip.

ItemTemplates.Name: {RZealot{x Spiked Belt
ItemTemplates.Description: A thick leather girdle lined with small iron studs. It fits tightly, keeping your core stable and your weapons secure.

ItemTemplates.Name: {dAshen{x Cloth Trousers
ItemTemplates.Description: Dark, smoke-scented trousers woven from a rare, flame-resistant fabric that doesn't rustle when you move.

ItemTemplates.Name: {GRunic {dSteel{x Greaves
ItemTemplates.Description: Polished steel plates contoured perfectly to the shins, humming with a faint, stabilizing magical vibration.

ItemTemplates.Name: {RZealot{x Leather Boots
ItemTemplates.Description: Heavy, combat-ready boots with thick steel toes, designed to leave deep imprints and endure brutal environments.

ItemTemplates.Name: Abyssal {wSilver {yBand{x
ItemTemplates.Description: A twisted silver ring set with a microscopic, pulsing dark gem that seems to draw upon the wearer's life force.

ItemTemplates.Name: Abyssal {gCopper {yBand{x
ItemTemplates.Description: A twisted silver ring set with a microscopic, pulsing dark gem that seems to draw upon the wearer's life force.

ItemTemplates.Name: Ashen {BCrystal{x Stud
ItemTemplates.Description: A small, jagged crystal fragment that whispers unintelligible fragments of heretical lore directly into your mind.

ItemTemplates.Name: {RZealot{x Steel Pauldrons
ItemTemplates.Description: Flaired, aggressive shoulderguards featuring jagged metal ridges designed to deflect heavy downward strikes.

ItemTemplates.Name: Ashen {dSteel{x Bracers
ItemTemplates.Description: Heavy forearm guards covered in soot-colored lacquer, capable of absorbing intense physical impacts or spell recoil.

ItemTemplates.Name: Abyssal Steel Dagger
ItemTemplates.Description: A serrated ritual blade made of dark steel. The edges ripple with an unstable, shadowy distortion when swung.

ItemTemplates.Name: {GRunic{x Iron Shield
ItemTemplates.Description: A heavy heater shield reinforced with an iron rim. A massive warding sigil is hammered directly into its center.

ItemTemplates.Name: Magical Chest of Beginner Items
ItemTemplates.Description: A magical chest that contains beginner items

NpcTemplates.Name: Blind Novice
NpcTemplates.Description: A frantic, newly recruited cultist wearing a starch-white blindfold. They stumble through the stone hallways, muttering half-learned prayers and striking out wildly at any sound.
